generated_oml:
// Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX 2D LiDAR configured to output real-time 2D point clouds over USB."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i RGB-D depth camera capturing synchronized RGB and depth images at 30 fps."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance OnBoardSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor using wheel tachometer providing speed in meters per second."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted
]

instance OnBoardSteeringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor providing steering wheel angle in degrees."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleMeasurementDataTransmitted
]

// Data Transmitted
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OnBoardSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleMeasurementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OnBoardSteeringSensor
]

// Data Elements
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data consisting of XYZXYZ coordinates."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image capturing 3D structure in pixel depth values."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance SpeedMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed measurement from wheel tachometer."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurement from vehicle steering sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleMeasurementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Segmented cluster labels derived from LiDAR point cloud using DBSCAN."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Kalman filter output tracking object positions and velocities."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ClusteredPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated vehicle state comprising speed and steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ACCDesiredSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired speed computed by ACC logic based on leading vehicle detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadEnabler
]

// Models
instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm applied to LiDAR point clouds for segmentation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking algorithm estimating object trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Accorded to ISO 15622 basic following algorithm computing desired speed."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE that serializes, unit-converts, and publishes sensor data over Wi-Fi to the ROS2 network."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Offloading FE responsible for transmitting ACC logic computations to the cloud."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote Management FE enabling enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, and issue emergency braking via user interface."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI service displaying real-time vehicle state, projected path, object tracks, and generating time-series reports."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that offloads ACC computation (lead vehicle detection, desired speed computation) onto cloud."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDesiredSpeedInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling ACC toggling, speed adjustment, and emergency braking via user interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

// Insights
instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state including speed and steering angle."
]

instance ACCDesiredSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of ACC computed desired speed and lead vehicle detection."
]

// Actions
instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control on demand."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to set the desired speed for ACC via user interface."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking action issued by user interface to halt vehicle immediately."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Acting Components
instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for the Vedder Electronic Speed Controller."
]

instance SteeringActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Translates desired steering angle commands into steering servo PWM signals."
]

// Environment
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler, 
            DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlLogicModel,
            MotorActuationFE, SteeringActuationFE,
            HokuyoUST10LX, IntelD435iDepthCamera, OnBoardSpeedSensor, OnBoardSteeringSensor,
            LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, DepthImageDataTransmitted, 
            SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleMeasurementDataTransmitted,
            LiDARPointCloudData, DepthImageData, SpeedMeasurementData, SteeringAngleMeasurementData,
            ClusteredPointCloudData, ObjectTrackData, VehicleStateData, ACCDesiredSpeedData,
            VehicleStateInsight, ACCDesiredSpeedInsight,
            EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction,
            DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin outputs ACC control signals (desired speed, steering commands, emergency braking flag) which are transmitted over Wi‑Fi to the vehicle’s on‑board ROS2 network; Data Translation FE deserializes ROS messages into actuator signals, which the Physical Twin Entity propels to the speed controller and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time processing with a maximum end‑to‑end latency of 100 ms; the Digital Twin synchronizes clocks to within 100 ms accuracy to maintain event order and data integrity across distributed components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An ISO 23247 entity‑based architecture: (1) Physical Twin Entity – handles sensor interfacing and low‑level actuation; (2) Digital Twin Entity – contains data collection, simulation, and ACC computation FEs; (3) User Entity – provides 3D visualization and control panel FEs; (4) Cross‑system Data Translation FE – mediates message serialization between entities; all components run as ROS2 nodes communicating over a shared ROS2 network and Wi‑Fi mesh."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Designed and developed during the case‑study phase (verification of ACC logic), manufactured the physical vehicle, and currently in the operated stage with real‑time monitoring and remote control; future stages may include maintenance and iterative update via remote management."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Real‑time data fidelity ensured by 100 ms latency constraint and 100 ms clock synchronization; model validity derived from state‑of‑the‑art perception algorithms (DBSCAN, Kalman) and ACC logic compliant with ISO 15622; safety validation via end‑to‑end latency and low‑level actuator command accuracy; no explicit model uncertainty bounds reported."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑entity communication inside the DT uses ROS 2 bus (message passing over DDS is implicit in ROS 2), while communication between the PT and DT entities occurs over a Wi‑Fi network. No specific wireless protocols (e.g., 802.11ac) are specified in the document; the connection is described generically as Wi‑Fi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Edge deployment on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (on‑board) for perception and lightweight control; cloud deployment for Digital Twin Entity services (data storage, UI, ACC computation) hosted on an external server; cross‑system Data Translation FE runs on the vehicle chassis and communicates with cloud via Wi‑Fi."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not explicitly described in the provided documents; the architecture is based on ISO 23247 and ROS 2, which are interoperable standards but no external system integration is detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture is employed as the DT backbone; ACC logic adheres to ISO 15622; ROS 2 is used as the middleware. No other specific standards are mentioned."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical constraints include end‑to‑end latency ≤100 ms (R7) and 100 ms clock sync (R8); ACC logic adheres to ISO 15622; no explicit cybersecurity mechanisms (authentication, encryption) are specified in the document."
]
